title: Marine (disambiguation)
content:
'''Marine''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[21st Nova Corps]]''', a [[Republic Military|military]] unit of [[clone trooper]]s known as the '''Galactic Marines'''
*'''[[Imperial Marines]]''', a military branch within the [[Imperial Military|Armed Forces]] of the [[Galactic Empire]]
*The '''[[Marine Corps]]''', which consisted of [[special forces]] [[soldier]]s of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Marine E-Web]]''', an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster cannon]] owned by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Sentinel]]
*'''[[Marine Trooper]]''', a set of armor worn by the [[human]] [[Hunter (Grand Arena)|Hunter]] [[Sentinel]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Clone marine]]s''', elite [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]]
*'''[[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]]''', a [[Republic Military/Legends|military]] unit of clone troopers
*'''[[Droid marine]]s''', a variant of the [[B1-Series battle droid]]
*'''[[Rebel Marine]]s''', [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]
*'''[[Marines (SpecForce)|Alliance Special Forces Marines]]''', a division of the Rebel Alliance's [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Special Forces]]
*'''[[Imperial Marine]]s''', a specialized branch of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]]
*'''[[New Republic Marine]]s''', the [[Starship/Legends|ship]]-to-ship assault and defense infantry of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Marines]]''', a force established for the defense of [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] ships
*'''[[Kathol Republic Marines]]''', a military force serving the [[Kathol Republic]]

{{Disambig}}

|de=Marine
}}
